title: Contract C - ML Anomaly Alert Output
description: Data contract for anomaly detection alerts. Owner: ML Team

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the anomaly was detected

expected_wattage_range.description: Expected wattage range based on historical data

actual_wattage.description: Actual wattage that triggered the alert

message.description: Human-readable alert message for the user
message.example: Warning: Your current usage is 80% higher than your historical average for this time of day. Check appliances to avoid bill shock at end of billing cycle.

example.message: Warning: Your current usage is 80% higher than your historical average for this time of day. Check appliances to avoid bill shock at end of billing cycle.
